name: Event card
when_to_use: 需要把一场活动的标题、日期时间、地点、简介和可选封面作为成品卡片交付时用它：适合会议、讲座、发布会与社区活动。多场活动按日期比较时应用 event-list/calendar；需要报名或选择时段时应使用带上行能力的表单组件。
why_valuable: 纯段落中的活动信息不容易一眼找到日期与地点，手写卡片又常在时区、窄屏和封面缺失时失衡；本模板把结构化日期徽章、时间、场地、地址、简介与标签稳定组合，并为无封面状态提供品牌渐变。

en.when_to_use: Use it to deliver a finished card for one event with its title, date and time, location, description, and optional cover: suitable for conferences, talks, launches, and community events. To compare multiple events by date, use event-list/calendar; for registration or time-slot selection, use a form component with uplink capability.
en.why_valuable: Event details in plain paragraphs make dates and locations hard to scan, while hand-written cards often become unbalanced across time zones, narrow screens, and missing covers; this template reliably combines a structured date badge, time, venue, address, description, and tags, with a branded gradient when no cover is supplied.

data_in.note: data represents one event. date, time, and location use preformatted text; the component does not parse dates or convert time zones. date.month/day forms the main badge. cover.src may be a data URL or an image URL allowed by the host; omit it to retain the gradient cover. tags are read-only labels.

schema.title: string -- event title
schema.eyebrow?: string -- event type above the title; displays "Upcoming event" when omitted
schema.date: {month:string,day:string|number,weekday?:string,year?:string|number} -- date badge; month/day are the primary information
schema.cover?: {src:string,alt?:string} -- optional cover; src may be a data URL or an image URL permitted by the host
schema.tags?: string[] -- short read-only tags at the bottom of the card

spec.note: The cover is about 190px high, and the body grows naturally with the description and tags; below 520px the cover and date badge tighten. No vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: data 表示单场活动。date、time、location 都使用已格式化文本，组件不解析日期、不换算时区；date.month/day 组成主徽章。cover.src 可为 data URL 或宿主允许的图片 URL，省略时保留渐变封面。tags 是只读标签。

schema.title: string —— 活动标题
schema.eyebrow?: string —— 标题上方的活动类型；省略时显示 “Upcoming event”
schema.date: {month:string,day:string|number,weekday?:string,year?:string|number} —— 日期徽章；month/day 为主信息
schema.time: {start:string,end?:string,timezone?:string} —— 已格式化时间；不做时区换算
schema.cover?: {src:string,alt?:string} —— 可选封面；src 可为 data URL 或宿主许可的图片 URL
schema.tags?: string[] —— 卡片底部的只读短标签

spec.note: 封面高约 190px，正文按简介与标签自然增高；520px 以下收紧封面和日期徽章。无 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 示例是一场墨尔本设计系统活动，覆盖内联 SVG 封面、完整日期/时区、场地地址、简介和标签；不依赖外部图片请求。

minimal.title: Design Systems After Dark
minimal.description: An evening of practical talks on accessible tokens, component governance and the craft of shipping coherent interfaces at scale.

cover.alt: Abstract indigo and cyan event artwork

uplink: display-only：活动信息与标签仅供浏览；没有报名、收藏或日历写入，也不向 AI 回传任何选择。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
